$curated: State-composition gate for study-result (Template B). study-result is NOT a route — it is the finished branch of study-session (state.finished == true → _result() rendered inside study-session's MxScaffold). study-result.gen.json lists one MxCard (study-result/goal, primarySoft), but the FE does NOT render or key it (goal/streak is surfaced on the dashboard Today card — see intent-ledger study-result/goal), so there is 0 real MxCard-keyed widget here; a Template-A cast<MxCard>() would find nothing. Assert the keyed CONTAINER set per state; never cast. UNIVERSE = the two keyed result-body buttons: continue (MxButton primary) + library (MxButton secondary). study-result/screen (the MxContentBounds result container) is keyed but excluded from the gate universe — it is the always-present result body wrapper (chrome-like), and the study-session/screen+appbar are the real scaffold chrome. GATED: standard (a finished session → words + accuracy text + the two buttons). COVERAGE GAPS (6, not gated): goal-met / goal-missed / many-wrong render the SAME FE node-set as standard — _result() only changes the words/accuracy TEXT, not any keyed identity (the kit's goal card + review-wrong button do not exist in the FE — intent-ledger); finalizing / retry-finalize / finalize-error do NOT exist in the FE at all — _finalize() runs synchronously inside grade() (D-010), so there is no async save surface that can be pending/retried/errored (intent-ledger study-result/finalize). Identity-rollout / divergence gaps (kit nodes not keyed in the FE): study-result/goal, /review-wrong, /later, /finalize-retry, /finalize-later, /appbar, /close, and the kit stat cards (stat-0..2, goal-bar, finalizing-stat-*, finalize-error) which are not keyed components. Cross-checked by test/presentation/features/study/study_result_states_test.dart.
